caps.proposition_text: The patient reports knee pain rated 6 to 7 on a scale of 1 to 10.

evidence.span_text: okay alright and then so how's the pain with your knee on a scale of one to ten one being the least pain ten being the worst pain how's how's it been ranging

caps.proposition_text: The patient reports pain to palpation at the medial joint line.

evidence.span_text: yep okay so you definitely feeling some a little bit of pain to palpation at the medial joint line now i'm gon na have you lie on your back and also i'm gon na do some maneuvering here of your leg i'm gon na do a real quick test on you here okay alright how does that feel

caps.proposition_text: The patient reports a feeling of looseness in the knee.

evidence.span_text: i can bend it but it hurts towards the end of the motion and i can straighten it but it does n't it feels like i have to help get it straightened

caps.proposition_text: The patient reports pain in the left hand.

evidence.span_text: yeah definitely so yeah so you you can limit the activities for sure in terms of your work activities i know if you sit too long sometimes it can be painful because you do need to move that leg a little bit so it does n't lock up so i i would like for you to you know do do some slight activities not enough to stress your legs but definitely move move them a little bit every now and then so it does n't lock up on you okay

caps.proposition_text: The patient reports pain in the knee.

evidence.span_text: a little bit of pain there not not really bad it's it feels like it's just more on the inside of my knee

caps.proposition_text: The patient reports swelling in the knee.

evidence.span_text: it's somewhere between six and seven right now it's about four or five with some of the swelling going down

gotcha okay alright well let's go ahead and take a look at your knee here real quick before i take a look at your knee here i'm gon na do a physical exam and in terms of your gait here i did notice that you do have a marked limp on your looks like it's your right leg upon ambulation so let me go ahead and take a look at that right knee real quick i do appreciate some significant effusion in the right knee just a slight bit of ecchymosis let me just feel around here scott how does that feel does that hurt when i kinda press on that there

caps.proposition_text: The doctor will have the nurse schedule an MRI.

evidence.span_text: very good alright well i'm gon na go ahead and have the nurse take you to the scheduler to get your mri and i'll get back with you as soon as we get the results of that

caps.proposition_text: The doctor recommends moving the legs slightly.

evidence.span_text: yeah definitely so yeah so you you can limit the activities for sure in terms of your work activities i know if you sit too long sometimes it can be painful because you do need to move that leg a little bit so it does n't lock up so i i would like for you to you know do do some slight activities not enough to stress your legs but definitely move move them a little bit every now and then so it does n't lock up on you okay

caps.proposition_text: The doctor recommends limiting work activities.

evidence.span_text: it it does now well i need to limit my work activities i i typically sit behind a desk but it's not been very comfortable sitting here lately

caps.proposition_text: The doctor recommends slowing down jogging.
